creator: uzimac@da3m0n8t3r.com
text:
Modern version of libzrtpcpp uses a CMake build, also uses gcc4.6 to avoid some template issues seen with 4.2.1

libzrtpcpp is a separate extension package for GNU ccRTP, it provides support for the ZRTP protocol (as defined in the Internet draft draft-zimmermann-avt-zrtp).


Thank you.

Fix: na

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: na
